question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters/sections of the thesis (e.g., Methodology, Results, Conclusion). It only lists the development plan/timeline and the 'Problem Statement' and 'Relevance' sub-sections of the introduction.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes the context and importance of the research topic (the 'why'), but it fails to describe what will be contained in the upcoming chapters of the thesis.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be understood from this text, as it focuses on the problem definition and a timeline of tasks rather than a roadmap of the thesis contents.
